topic: My new neighbor knows things about me he should not know
title: My New Neighbor Knows Things About Me He Should Not Know | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: My new neighbor knows things about me he should not know.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a front door peephole view from inside a house at night, a man standing on the porch visible in distorted fisheye perspective, his face indistinct due to the lens curvature, porch light behind him casting his shape into silhouette, the door chain still latched at the edge of frame, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: New tenant moved in mid-October. He introduced himself as Paul.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of a residential driveway at dusk, a man seen from behind unloading boxes from the back of a dark van, only his back and the boxes visible, the porch light of the neighboring house on, vertical 9:16 framing

close shot of a neighbor's front porch at twilight, a single chair on the porch, a porch light on, no one visible, the front door slightly ajar, the neighboring house visible in soft focus behind, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Third day he asked how my transfer to the Delaney Street office was going.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a wooden fence between two residential properties, a man's back visible on one side speaking over the fence, the other side empty, afternoon light casting the fence shadow long across the grass, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I had not told anyone about the transfer.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a desk with an open laptop showing a work email, the screen slightly blurred to obscure details, a hand resting on the desk beside it, dim home office lighting, curtains visible on the window behind, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The next week he mentioned my mother's name.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of a front yard at dusk, a figure standing near a mailbox seen from a distance, the neighboring house behind them, porch light on, no details visible on the figure, slight fog at the edge of the yard, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I had never spoken about my mother to anyone on that street.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a framed photograph on a windowsill showing a woman and a young man, the photo facing the window with light from outside passing through it, the room behind dim and shadowed, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I checked social media. My accounts were private.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a smartphone screen in a dark room showing a social media profile page with a locked privacy icon visible, the screen glow illuminating a hand holding the phone, dark bedroom behind, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I found his van parked on my street every night. Different spot. Moving closer.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of a residential street at night from an upstairs window, a dark panel van parked along the curb under a streetlamp, no other vehicles nearby, the rest of the street empty and quiet, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Last Tuesday he knocked on my door and said he hoped the anniversary was not too hard. My father died eleven years ago on that exact date. I had told no one.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a front door from inside a house at night, the peephole view slightly fisheye, a man standing on the porch visible through the peephole in distorted perspective, porch light behind him, the door chain still latched, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I called the property manager. No record of a Paul.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a hand holding a landline phone receiver in a kitchen at night, the phone cord visible, the window above the sink dark, curtains partially drawn, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The house is empty again. His chair is still on the porch.
scenes.image_prompt: wide exterior shot of the neighboring house at dusk, the lawn already beginning to overgrow, the driveway empty, a single wooden chair on the front porch facing the street, porch light still on, vertical 9:16 framing
